Uses of Class
com.cellsimulation.model.Position

Packages that use Position
Package
Description
com.cellsimulation.model
Core simulation model: persons, grid, engine, and shared types.
com.cellsimulation.neighborhood
Strategy implementations for cell neighborhood computation.

  • Uses of Position in com.cellsimulation.model

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model that return Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Position
    Person.getPosition()
     
    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model that return types with arguments of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Position>
    Grid.getEmptyNeighbors(Position position, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood)
    Returns the empty cells among the neighbors of the given position, according to the supplied strategy.
    Methods in com.cellsimulation.model with parameters of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SimulationEngine.addCell(Position position, DiseaseState state)
    Creates a new Person with the given initial state and places it on the grid at the specified position.
    Person
    Grid.getCell(Position position)
    Returns the person occupying the given position, or null if the cell is empty.
    List<Position>
    Grid.getEmptyNeighbors(Position position, NeighborhoodStrategy neighborhood)
    Returns the empty cells among the neighbors of the given position, according to the supplied strategy.
    boolean
    Grid.isInside(Position position)
    Indicates whether the given position lies inside this grid.
    void
    Grid.removeCell(Position position)
    Empties the cell at the given position.
    void
    SimulationEngine.removeCell(Position position)
    Removes the inhabitant of the given cell, if any.
    void
    Grid.setCell(Position position, Person person)
    Places (or removes) a person at the given position.
    void
    Person.setPosition(Position position)
    Sets the position of this person on the grid.
    Constructors in com.cellsimulation.model with parameters of type Position
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Person(DiseaseState state, Position position)
    Creates a new Person with no individual immunity (immunityFactor == 0.0).
     
    Person(DiseaseState state, Position position, double immunityFactor)
    Creates a new Person with the given initial state, position and immunity factor.

  • Uses of Position in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood

    Methods in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood that return types with arguments of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Position>
    EuclideanNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Euclidean radius.
    List<Position>
    ManhattanNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Manhattan distance.
    List<Position>
    MooreNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the eight Moore neighbors of the given position.
    List<Position>
    NeighborhoodStrategy.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the positions of the neighbors of the given position on the provided grid, according to this strategy.
    List<Position>
    OrthogonalNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the four orthogonal neighbors of the given position.
    Methods in com.cellsimulation.neighborhood with parameters of type Position
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Position>
    EuclideanNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Euclidean radius.
    List<Position>
    ManhattanNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the neighbors of the given position lying within the Manhattan distance.
    List<Position>
    MooreNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the eight Moore neighbors of the given position.
    List<Position>
    NeighborhoodStrategy.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the positions of the neighbors of the given position on the provided grid, according to this strategy.
    List<Position>
    OrthogonalNeighborhood.getNeighbors(Grid grid, Position position)
    Returns the four orthogonal neighbors of the given position.
